hero.description: I build clean, modern, and maintainable frontend experiences with React, TypeScript, and Next.js. My focus is on polished UI architecture, reusable components, and practical engineering grounded in algorithms, problem-solving, and real-world product work.
hero.card.title: Building real products with a strong frontend foundation
about.title: About
about.text: I am a CS student and frontend developer with a deep interest in Persian NLP. I build modern, accessible web applications and explore the intersection of heritage scripts and contemporary tooling. My work spans from React/3D engineering to ParsBERT sentiment lexicons.
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Stack • Systems • Experimentation

projects.title: Projects
projects.voteria.title: Voteria
projects.voteria.desc: Community publishing platform inspired by Reddit, built with React and modern frontend state management.
projects.lexicon.title: Scientific Association Website
projects.lexicon.desc: Designed and developed the Computer Engineering Scientific Association website at Birjand University.
projects.hooshtan.title: ICPC Contest Website
projects.hooshtan.desc: Designed the Birjand University ICPC website and supported contest information flow through the frontend.
projects.icpc.title: Frontend Portfolio Work
projects.icpc.desc: A collection of React-based interfaces and product-oriented frontend work focused on clarity, maintainability, and user experience.
projects.subtitle: A selection of products and experiments at the intersection of interface craft, tooling, and real-world problem solving.
contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Let's build something meaningful together. I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
